description_long: This is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical black boiler, a blue main body, and a red and black cab at the rear. The locomotive features prominent brass domes and a smokestack at the front, with a cowcatcher and headlamp mounted on the frontmost section. It rides on a set of black spoked wheels, with visible connecting rods and mechanical details along the sides. The cab is enclosed with windows and a black roof, and the train sits on a section of metal railway track with wooden ties. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century American steam engines, often seen in historical or heritage urban settings. No additional carriages are attached, and the train appears to be a single locomotive unit.
description: A detailed blue and black steam locomotive with brass accents, red cab, and classic spoked wheels, sitting on railway tracks. Features include a smokestack, cowcatcher, and enclosed cab.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round smokestack, cowcatcher, headlamp, and the narrow width of the locomotive.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive, blue boiler, brass domes, red cab, and all wheels on the track.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the cab, black roof, and the end of the track section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the blue boiler, brass domes, and red cab from the other side.
attribute_door_placement: doors at each end of the cab
attribute_window_arrangement: spaced rectangular windows on the cab
